3292890.name: C.A.R.D.S Redux
3292890.description:
C.A.R.D.S REDUX is a roguelike game about a war on a fictional planet (that's almost identical to ours) where you play as robot protagonist, GLUNDO. A robot with the ability to retain memory throughout it's many deaths, in hopes that one day, they can mass produce it to help win the war.

In C.A.R.D.S REDUX you can...

  • Destroy other Robots designed to stop you in your tracks!

  • Collect Cards as you advance throughout the rooms to prepare you as the difficulty scales.

  • Go to Aubrey's Shop and purchase Chips, which you can allocate to one of three slots. These chips can modify how your run will go entirely!

  • Destroy Bosses to prove yourself worthy as the BEST war machine this planet has ever faced.

  • Get killed, like, a lot of times.

  • Unlock EVERYTHING!!! SECRETS!!! I would tell you what everything includes, but those would include secrets....
3292890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
